label: CM-12(1)
title: Automated Tools to Support Information Location

prose.en: Use automated tools to identify {param:cm-12.01_odp.01} on {param:cm-12.01_odp.02} to ensure controls are in place to protect organizational information and individual privacy.

guidance.en: The use of automated tools helps to increase the effectiveness and efficiency of the information location capability implemented within the system. Automation also helps organizations manage the data produced during information location activities and share such information across the organization. The output of automated information location tools can be used to guide and inform system architecture and design decisions.

prose.en: automated tools are used to identify {param:cm-12.01_odp.01} on {param:cm-12.01_odp.02} to ensure that controls are in place to protect organizational information and individual privacy.

objects.en: procedures addressing identification and documentation of information location
Organizational personnel with responsibilities for managing information location
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
automated mechanisms enforcing policies and methods for governing information location
automated tools used to identify information on system components

guidelines.en: information to be protected is defined by information type;
system components where the information is located are defined;
